user_query: Search OneDrive for Excel files and read the content of the first two found.

plan.query: Search OneDrive for Excel files and read the content of the first two found.
plan.reasoning: The task involves searching OneDrive for Excel files and then reading their content. This can be done in a single step by gathering both the search results and requesting the content of the first two files in one instruction.

steps.task: Search OneDrive for Excel files and read the content of the first two found. If fewer than two Excel files are found, return the content of all found files.

plan.synthesis: Present the content of the Excel files retrieved in step 1.

invoked_agents.input: Search OneDrive for Excel files and read the content of the first two found. If fewer than two Excel files are found, return the content of all found files.
